title: AI 初创公司 Sereact 融资 1.1 亿美元，用于开发预测后果的机器人
summary: Sereact, a German robotics software company, has raised $110 million in fresh funding to develop its artificial intelligence model that makes robots smarter and more adaptable to different tasks.（原题：AI Startup Sereact Raises $110 Million for Robots That Predict Consequences）

title: ABB Robotics推出针对工业任务的PoWa协作机器人系列
